mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We exist to help young adults grow in their faith, build authentic relationships, and understand why they believe what they believe. We're a small community committed to truth-driven faith and gospel-centered living.

values.title: Truth-Driven
values.description: We don't follow blindly. We examine Scripture with honesty, engage with evidence, and seek to understand why Christianity is true.

values.title: Authentic Community
values.description: We're a tight-knit group where everyone knows your name. No masks, no pretense — just real relationships and honest conversations.

values.title: Gospel-Centered
values.description: Everything we do points back to Jesus — His life, death, resurrection, and the hope He offers to all who believe.

values.title: Welcoming
values.description: Whether you're a lifelong believer or just exploring, you're welcome here. Come as you are — we're all learning together.

values.title: Prayer-Focused
values.description: We believe prayer changes things. We pray for each other, support one another, and trust God to work in and through us.

values.title: Community-Centered
values.description: From Bible studies to beach volleyball, we believe faith is lived out in community. We grow together in and out of the study room.

story.title: Our Story
paragraphs: GBC NEXT GEN started as a small group of young adults who wanted more than just surface-level faith. We wanted depth. We wanted truth. We wanted community.
What began as a handful of people meeting in a living room has grown into a vibrant community of young adults committed to studying Scripture with conviction and loving each other well.
We're still small — and we like it that way. Being small means we actually know each other. We celebrate together, struggle together, and grow together.
Today, we meet every Wednesday night for Bible study, with regular events like beach days, church visits, and game nights. We're always excited to welcome new faces into our family.

leader.name: Sasha
leader.bio: Sasha has been leading GBC NEXT GEN since its early days. He's passionate about helping young adults discover the truth of Scripture and build real community. Whether it's leading a Bible study, organizing a beach day, or grabbing coffee with someone one-on-one, Sasha is all in.
